summary: Frontend-only validation of header overflow fix on AdviserClientDashboard and new SimpleRetirement 5-section page. All core requirements pass: header metrics render cleanly without overlap at 1280/1440/1920px (wraps to 2 rows at 1280, single row at 1920), all 14 SimpleRetirement testids render, SVG gauge viewBox='0 0 260 170', Improve My Plan reveals inline scenario slider, all 7 tabs load without error boundary. Thompson (99%) shows +0% boosts (acceptable — at ceiling), Client 4 (Williams, 94%) shows +1% boost on delay-retirement and correct top risk ('Spending draws down capital too fast').

issues: Metrics wrap to 2 rows (Net Worth+Confidence row1, Risk+Updated row2) because `xl:` Tailwind breakpoint = 1280px and content needs slightly more. Not an overlap — clean flex-wrap. User's original 'stacked labels on values' issue is FIXED. If a single-row layout is desired at 1280, consider using `lg:flex-row` (1024px) instead of `xl:flex-row`.

action_items: (Optional) Lower the header's single-row breakpoint from xl: (1280px) to lg: (1024px) so 1280px shows all 4 metrics on one row.

(Observation) Client 4 already at 94% confidence so improvement boosts are near-ceiling (+1%/+0%). If the product goal is to showcase larger boosts, seed a genuinely low-confidence client (e.g., 60-70%) or adjust CLIENT_DATA for client_5.
critical_code_review_comments: SimpleRetirement.jsx imports Progress + CheckCircle2 lucide icons but neither is used — minor unused-import cleanup.
Improvement boost calculation uses `Math.max(0, ...)` which hides negative scenarios; acceptable since UI only surfaces improvements, but worth a comment.
AdviserClientDashboard.jsx is ~595 lines — still within limits but approaching the split threshold; the sub-card components could live in separate files for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing thompson_family and client_4 from CLIENT_DATA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Adviser dashboard at /dashboard requires localStorage keys: app_mode='adviser', active_client_id, selected_client (JSON). SimpleRetirement is now the Retirement tab (replaces RetirementConfidence). All 5 sections validated with testids. Header uses xl:flex-row (1280+) — at exactly 1280 px content wraps to 2 rows but no overlap. Headless browser console shows unrelated `Failed to fetch` errors from PersonalDashboard fetchUserProfile/fetchRetirementData — those paths aren't hit in adviser mode, ignore.
rca of the issue: N/A — validation only, no bug found
